solutions.solution: Following family diagram can be drawn from the given information: [Family tree diagram showing Amit's father married to Amit's mother, with Amit having a sister who is the daughter of Amit's mother, and her brother being the boy in red shirt]. Now, it is clear that the boy in red shirt is the brother of Amit.

Let us draw the family diagram. [Family tree diagram showing Gopal's Father with son Gopal, and Gopal is the father of Govind]. Clearly, the only son of Gopal's father is Gopal himself. This means Gopal is the father of Govind.

The family diagram showing the relation is drawn as: [Family tree diagram showing Man connected to Man's sister, with Mother-in-law relationship indicated, and Woman's husband connected to Woman]. Hence, the man's sister is mother-in-law of woman.

Let us draw the following family diagram: [Family tree diagram showing Father of the woman in conversation with Daughter, Mother of man in photograph (woman in conversation), and Man in Photograph]. Now, it is clear that the only daughter of the woman's father is the woman herself and hence, the man in the photograph is her son. Therefore, woman is the mother of the man in the photograph.
